body:
This happens to me with no custom modules.

I haven't swapped to fish yet, and have not customized it's config at all.

Here is my starship config

```toml
format = """
[ŅéČ](#47225e)\
$os\
$username\
[Ņé░](bg:#ff0080 fg:#47225e)\
$directory\
[Ņé░](fg:#ff0080 bg:#005353)\
$git_branch\
$git_status\
[Ņé░](fg:#005353 bg:#00334e)\
$c\
$elixir\
$elm\
$golang\
$gradle\
$haskell\
$java\
$julia\
$nodejs\
$nim\
$rust\
$scala\
[Ņé░](fg:#00334e bg:#ff0080)\
$docker_context\
[Ņé░](fg:#ff0080 bg:#47225e)\
$status\
$time\
[Ņé░](fg:#47225e)\
\r\n\
$shell\
"""

# Disable the blank line at the start of the prompt
# add_newline = false

# You can also replace your username with a neat symbol like ’äĀ  or disable this
# and use the os module below
[username]
show_always = true
style_user = "bg:#47225e"
style_root = "bg:#47225e"
format = '[$user ]($style)'
disabled = false

# An alternative to the username module which displays a symbol that
# represents the current operating system
[os]
style = "bg:#47225e"
disabled = false


[directory]
style = "bg:#ff0080"
format = "[ $path ]($style)"
truncate_to_repo = true
truncation_length = 3
truncation_symbol = "ŌĆ”/"

# Here is how you can shorten some long paths by text replacement
# similar to mapped_locations in Oh My Posh:
[directory.substitutions]
"Documents" = "¾░łÖ "
"Downloads" = "’ĆÖ "
"Music" = "’Ćü "
"Pictures" = "’ĆŠ "
# Keep in mind that the order matters. For example:
# "Important Documents" = " ¾░łÖ’ä¬ "
# will not be replaced, because "Documents" was already substituted before.
# So either put "Important Documents" before "Documents" or use the substituted version:
# "Important ¾░łÖ " = " ¾░łÖ’ä¬ "

[c]
symbol = "Ņś× "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[docker_context]
symbol = "’īł "
style = "bg:#ff0080"
format = '[ $symbol $context ]($style)'

[elixir]
symbol = "ŅēĄ "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[elm]
symbol = "Ņś¼ "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[git_branch]
symbol = "’Éś"
style = "bg:#005353"
format = '[ $symbol $branch ]($style)'

[git_status]
style = "bg:#005353"
format = '[$all_status$ahead_behind ]($style)'

[golang]
symbol = "Ņś¦ "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[gradle]
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[haskell]
symbol = "ŅØĘ "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[java]
symbol = "Ņē¢ "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[julia]
symbol = "Ņśż "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[nodejs]
symbol = "Ņ£ś"
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[nim]
symbol = "¾░åź "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[rust]
symbol = "Ņ×©"
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[scala]
symbol = "Ņ£Ę "
style = "bg:#00334e"
format = '[ $symbol ($version) ]($style)'

[time]
disabled = false
time_format = "%R" # Hour:Minute Format
style = "bg:#47225e"
format = '[ $time ]($style)'

[status]
style = 'bg:#47225e'
symbol = '[ŅÖö](fg:#ff0000 bg:#47225e)'
success_symbol = '[¾░ŚĪ](fg:#009900 bg:#47225e)'
format = '[ $symbol$common_meaning$signal_name$maybe_int]($style)'
map_symbol = true
disabled = false

[shell]
fish_indicator = 'Ņ╣ü'
powershell_indicator = '¾░©Ŗ'
pwsh_indicator = 'Ņ»ć'
cmd_indicator = 'Ņ»ä'
bash_indicator = '¾▒åā'
unknown_indicator = 'ŅÜæ'
style = '(fg:#00ffff)'
disabled = false

```
